def negative_pandas_to_dict_records_in_loop():
    rule_id = "pandas_to_dict_records_in_loop"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "DataFrame to_dict conversions are repeated inside loops."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
